name: MURIM 1.1: EMERGENCE OF THE BLOOD CULT
description:
More? I got you. Here you go!

THE WORLD HAS CHANGED

I was looking over the comments responding to the choice path and unfortunately while we did get some answers, they didn't specify where to send the forces or specific forces to use, so our world has changed thanks to your decisions!

While the Murim Alliance debated—arguing over which of the 4 Heavens to send, where to deploy them, how to coordinate—the Blood Demon struck.

Kunlun Sect is gone.

Every disciple. Every elder. The Sect Leader. The servants. An entire orthodox pillar of Murim, wiped from existence in a single night. No bodies. No survivors. Only crimson-stained snow and the lingering scent of death.

The Blood Demon has grown stronger. And worse—he is no longer alone.

From the shadows, a group has emerged calling themselves The Blood Cult. Cultists who had hidden for years, supporting from the dark, now revere him openly as their god—the one who will tear down the orthodox factions and drown the righteous in their own hypocrisy.

The Jianghu trembles. The balance has shifted.

And in this new chaos, two great families step forward with renewed strength and purpose.

THE TANG CLAN - Poison and Medicine, Two Sides of One Blade

Full Name: Sichuan Tang Family (사천 당씨)
Motto: "One drop of poison cures or kills; one breath of medicine heals or harms."
Symbol: Coiled green viper around a white lotus flower

The Tang Clan stands as the undisputed authority in both poison and medicine throughout all of Murim. While publicly aligned with the Murim Alliance, their methods blur into unorthodox territory, earning them wary respect even from those they protect. They are not merely martial artists—they are the Jianghu's premier alchemists, assassins, and healers.

Power Structure

Matriarch: Tang So-Yeon (Jade Viper) - One of the 4 Heavens, True Transformation Realm
Vice-Family Head: Tang Eun-Seok (Divine Physician) - Entry Transformation Realm, 135 years old
Heirs: Three siblings who embody the clan's dual nature

Stronghold: Hidden deep in the misty jungles of Sichuan Province

  • Ten Thousand Poisons Garden - Only Tang bloodline can walk freely

  • Medicine Hall - Rare herbs, ancient texts, healing chambers

  • Blood Serpent Lake - Source of the clan's deadliest poisons

Philosophy: "Poison and medicine are two sides of the same coin. To heal, one must first understand death."

TANG CLAN: KEY FIGURES

Tang Mu-Ho - The Sickly Second Young Master

  • Age: 20 | Condition: Uncultivable (severed Qi veins from birth)

  • Reality: Chronically ill, given until age 25 at best by physicians

  • Appearance: Thin and fragile (5'6"), pale translucent skin, gentle green eyes, trembling hands

  • Burden: Seen as disgrace by many in the clan, relentlessly bullied in silence

  • Truth: Despite being the "weakest," he is loved fiercely by his mother and sisters

  • Heart: Lives for his siblings' visits, dreams of being strong enough to protect them someday

"I'm sorry… I'll try harder tomorrow."
creator: Qjfavf
